ApplicationData represents the data structure used for storing application-related information.

B

BaseController - Class in com.github.dreamteam.controllers
BaseController serves as a gateway for interacting with the ML component.
BaseController() - Constructor for class com.github.dreamteam.controllers.BaseController
 
buildDreamTeam(HttpServletRequest, Long, Optional<Integer>, Optional<String>, Optional<String>, Optional<String>, Optional<String>) - Method in class com.github.dreamteam.controllers.ProjectController
Builds a dream team for a specific project using the ML component.
buildTeam(HttpServletRequest, Long, Optional<Integer>, Optional<String>, Optional<String>) - Method in class com.github.dreamteam.controllers.ProjectController
Builds a team for a specific project using the ML component.

checkHealth(HttpServletRequest) - Method in class com.github.dreamteam.controllers.HealthController
Health check endpoint to verify if the service is running.

Placeholder for cleaning datasets using all available cleaners.
cleanData(Optional<String>, Optional<String>, Optional<String>) - Method in class com.github.dreamteam.controllers.BaseController
Cleans the data specified by the user.

E

EntityNotFoundException - Exception Class in com.github.dreamteam.exceptions
EntityNotFoundException is thrown when a requested entity is not found in the database or collection.
EntityNotFoundException(String) - Constructor for exception class com.github.dreamteam.exceptions.EntityNotFoundException
Constructs a new EntityNotFoundException with the specified detail message.

G

getAllProjects(int) - Method in interface com.github.dreamteam.services.ProjectService
Retrieves all projects from the MongoDB database with an optional limit on the number of projects returned.
getAllProjects(int) - Method in class com.github.dreamteam.services.ProjectServiceImpl
Retrieves all projects from the MongoDB database with an optional limit on the number of projects returned.
getAllScores(HttpServletRequest, Optional<String>, Optional<String>, Optional<String>) - Method in class com.github.dreamteam.controllers.ProjectController
Redirects to the ML component for retrieving all scores.
getDatabaseName() - Method in class com.github.dreamteam.MongoClientConfig
Returns the MongoDB database name.
getProjects(Optional<String>, Optional<Integer>) - Method in class com.github.dreamteam.controllers.ProjectController
Retrieves a collection of projects based on the provided status and limit parameters.
getScores(HttpServletRequest, Long, Optional<String>, Optional<String>, Optional<String>) - Method in class com.github.dreamteam.controllers.ProjectController
Retrieves a collection of scores associated with a specific project.
getStudents(Long) - Method in class com.github.dreamteam.controllers.ProjectController
Retrieves a collection of students associated with a specific project.
getStudentsByProject(Long) - Method in interface com.github.dreamteam.services.StudentService
Retrieves a collection of students associated with a specific project ID from the MongoDB database.
getStudentsByProject(Long) - Method in class com.github.dreamteam.services.StudentServiceImpl
Retrieves a collection of students associated with a specific project ID from the MongoDB database.

H

handleAllExceptions(RuntimeException) - Method in class com.github.dreamteam.controllers.ProjectController
Handles RuntimeException and returns a 500 Internal Server Error response.
handleNotFoundExceptions(EntityNotFoundException) - Method in class com.github.dreamteam.controllers.ProjectController
Handles EntityNotFoundException and returns a 404 Not Found response.
HealthController - Class in com.github.dreamteam.controllers
HealthController is responsible for providing health check endpoints for the service.
HealthController() - Constructor for class com.github.dreamteam.controllers.HealthController
 

I

index() - Method in class com.github.dreamteam.controllers.BaseController
Root endpoint to verify service availability.
initialize() - Method in class com.github.dreamteam.controllers.BaseController
Initializes the ML system by first cleaning data and then training a model and making a prediction.
initializeWithMotivation() - Method in class com.github.dreamteam.controllers.BaseController
Initializes the ML system including motivation scoring.

The main method that starts the Spring Boot application.
